title: Coughton Court & Dovecote (Throckmorton)

main_route.excerpt: Simon, Eve, Tinder left at 6 for Coughton Court. We are in a farmer's field.

excursions.label: Visit to Coughton Court house and garden

stops.excerpt: Lunch in the courtyard block, then explored the house & garden [?for] of the Throckmorton family. lived here for 600 years.

excursions.label: Visit to nearby NT dovecote near Throckmorton

stops.excerpt: We went to see a nearby NT [illegible] dovecote. [?If] with ladder intact, it was amazing. The bird perches were staggered in the way they pointed.

unresolved.issue: The National Trust dovecote is described as 'nearby' Coughton Court with an illegible word; likely the dovecote at Throckmorton (Worcestershire) or possibly Kinwarton Dovecote — exact site uncertain
unresolved.excerpt: We went to see a nearby NT [illegible] dovecote. [?If] with ladder intact, it was amazing.

boundary_flags: mixed_start: page B_0250_R is flagged as boundary_mixed=true; content appears self-contained (Friday–Sunday narrative complete on this page)
summary: A short Friday-to-Sunday trip for Simon, Eve and the dog Tinder to Coughton Court in Warwickshire, staying in a farmer's field nearby. On Saturday they visited the Throckmorton family's historic house and garden; on Sunday they saw a nearby National Trust dovecote before driving home for lunch.
extraction_notes: Only Simon, Eve and Tinder are named as travellers — no children mentioned. The page's dates array records iso '2009-05-29' but the trip_id year is 2015 and 29 May 2015 was indeed a Friday, so 2015 is used throughout. 'Westbury Court Garden' appears in the parsed places list but is absent from the transcribed text and has been excluded as a stop. The dovecote is described as 'NT' (National Trust) with an illegible qualifier; the title slug references Throckmorton and a separate 2005 trip to 'Aston Cantlow Kinwarton Dovecot' exists, making this likely a different site — flagged as unresolved.
